subject: [OOM] Fix issue with K8S semver check
commit_message:
[OOM] Fix issue with K8S semver check

The current kubeVersion leads to deployment issue, 1.19.X-Y
X-Y must be added so that it can work on a patched k8s.

Issue-ID: OOM-2873
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I90df220853f2884c7ade415b060a227e5f6ecb50

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 13 on the queue.
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 398742610), max time: 24400 seconds
